caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact St Thomas Today
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing moderate winds up to 22 kt with seas reaching 5.6 ft and a dominant southeast swell period of 7 seconds. Rain probability is 63%, indicating a significant chance of showers affecting the port alongside these conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing moderate northerly winds reaching 20 kt with wave heights up to 4.5 ft and a 5-second swell period. Rain probability is 32%, while Athens (Piraeus) sees lighter winds near 9 kt and less than 10% rain probability.
